title: Blitz Origin (Speed thief)
description: The Blitz drains the vigour of others to feed its own body. It'll leave you fatigued and sprint around you with your own energy.
body:
**Blitz (Revamp) V1.0**
Made by: Amaranth_Red     
Description: The Blitz drains the vigour of others to feed its own body. It'll leave you fatigued and sprint around you with your own energy.

**Speed Thief:** You can steal the speed of other entities temporarily by punching them to fill a bar that decays over time. 

**Energy Seeking:** You can see undrained entities through walls.

**Self Control:** Press primary to increase the amount of speed you use, and press primary while sneaking to decrease the amount of it you use. Your regeneration speed, mining speed and attack speed are also affected by how much speed you use, you can't regenerate health without a speed usage.

**Training:** To use more speed you need to get running experience, you can see how much experience you have and need by trying to use more speed.

**Justice:** You lose a small amount of speed when hit.

**Dependency:** You deal 20% less damage while not using speed.

**Low Defence:** You have 3 hearts less than human. 

**Too Fast:** The higher your speed the more damage you take. 

***PEHKUI IS REQUIRED TO STEP UP BLOCKS WHILE RUNNING***
